title: Inference, Serving, and Latency
shortSummary: Explore the serving layer: throughput, caching, batching, fallbacks, and the cost-quality-speed triangle.
whyItMatters: The demo and the production system diverge fastest at inference time. The ability to keep responses fast, affordable, and reliable under real traffic is a core frontier engineering skill.
coreConcepts: Streaming, batching, caching, and routing strategies
Choosing between hosted APIs and self-hosted serving
Observing throughput, token usage, and failure spikes
